g.text: Built on Claude Code · Personal Project
A modular, self-improving system layered on Claude Code: persistent memory, custom skills,
automated triggers, and deep tool integrations. Designed for real daily use, not demos.
Built a structured memory system that gives the AI
continuity across sessions. Context routes by topic and
loads automatically so every conversation starts
A library of reusable slash commands for recurring tasks:
daily briefings, security reviews, cert prep, and more.
Event-based hooks fire automatically around AI
interactions, routing prompts to context and triggering
downstream scripts. Patterns that required manual
and domain hosting wired into one interface.
Cross-platform tasks that once required tab-switching
